series_metadata.series_description: Review of the general and critical areas of a sponsoring agency''s Child Nutrition Program.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: review files three years current year or next review cycle. If an agency is terminated cause, removed from National Disqualified List or State Disqualified List (a minimum of seven years) and/or any outstanding debt is paid USDA; if an appeal is filed ; Electronic: review files three years current year or next review cycle.
